sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n55646" key="kataxusma/tion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κατα-χυσμάτιον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <gramGrp opt="n" TEIform="gramGrp"> <gram type="dim" opt="n" TEIform="gram">Dim. of</gram> </gramGrp> foreg., <sense id="n55646.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sauce for pouring over</tr_> a dish, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0486.tlg001:108:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pherecr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">108.11</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:6:68" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.68</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
